overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along the Pacifica waterfront promenade on a sunny day. The player passes a 'Welcome to Pacifica' billboard and walks toward the Grand Imperial Mall pyramid building, with the amusement park ferris wheel visible across the street and futuristic skyscrapers under construction lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade entrance with welcome billboard

events.description: passing the Welcome to Pacifica billboard and entering the main waterfront district
ferris wheel first becomes visible in the distance marking the amusement park district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk past the Pacifica welcome billboard

entered.detail: large retro-style billboard with 'Welcome to Pacifica' text and cityscape image
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from the water
calm ocean water extending to the horizon
green painted metal railing separating sidewalk from the multi-lane road
asphalt road with multiple lanes of traffic
tall modern buildings with glass facades and construction cranes
tall palm tree lining the waterfront walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a prominent 'Welcome to Pacifica' billboard on the right as the camera walks along a sunny waterfront promenade. The concrete barrier separates the walkway from the calm ocean, while futuristic skyscrapers under construction rise across the multi-lane road to the left. Traffic moves steadily along the road as the ferris wheel first appears in the distant left.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal road with amusement park district visible

events.description: roller coaster tracks become visible alongside the ferris wheel across the road
black pickup truck drives past on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront promenade with the amusement park district now clearly visible on the left

entered.detail: large white ferris wheel part of the amusement park across the street
red steel roller coaster structure visible behind the ferris wheel
multiple cranes atop the unfinished skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the scene opens up to reveal the amusement park district across the road, marked by a large ferris wheel and roller coaster tracks. Construction cranes dot the skyline of unfinished futuristic towers. The camera continues walking along the concrete sidewalk, passing palm trees as vehicles drive by on the left.

events.description: pedestrian crosses the multi-lane road from left to right ahead of the camera
red sports car speeds past on the road

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distinctive pyramid-shaped building with the amusement park structures visible to the left

notable_agents.action: crossing the multi-lane road from left to right

entered.detail: distinctive pyramid-shaped building with stepped architecture, the Grand Imperial Mall

segments.scene_description: The pyramid-shaped Grand Imperial Mall becomes the dominant focal point ahead as the camera continues along the waterfront. A pedestrian crosses the road amidst moderate traffic including a red sports car. The ferris wheel recedes into the distance on the left while the futuristic skyline remains visible across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: final approach to the pyramid commercial complex

events.description: slight left curve in walking path as the sidewalk bends toward the pyramid building

agents.ego_description: approaching the pyramid building with the waterfront barrier still visible to the right

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera continues its approach toward the pyramid building, which now dominates the center of the frame. The path curves slightly left as it nears the structure. The roller coaster tracks fade from view in the distance while traffic continues to flow along the coastal road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a sunny waterfront promenade that transitions from a welcoming gateway into the heart of a futuristic urban district. It begins by passing a prominent Welcome to Pacifica billboard on the right, moving alongside a concrete barrier that separates the walkway from the calm ocean and a road lined with skyscrapers under construction. As the camera advances, the view opens up to reveal an amusement park district across the street, where a large ferris wheel and roller coaster tracks emerge beneath a skyline of construction cranes. The scene then shifts focus toward the pyramid-shaped Grand Imperial Mall as it becomes the dominant focal point ahead, while a red sports car and other vehicles flow through the moderate traffic. Finally, the camera continues its approach as the path curves slightly left, leaving the amusement park behind to face the towering pyramid structure centered in the frame.
